Send a correction
Post Comment
Way Better Than Gebs
QuoteReply
# Apr 11 2003 at 7:57 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593362391168
4 posts
I bought these for 2.1k for a great deal on povar, i have to say... my mana increased by about 1/8th of a blue bub... thats a LOAD of mana, difference between 1 more root or another dot to end a mobs life. I feel alot of people like the focus effect on GEBS... thats why they get them. I say ppl can wait an extra 3 seconds for their little buffs
▲ Page top
GEBs? Or Coldains
QuoteReply
# Oct 13 2002 at 4:21 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591780771578
92 posts
These boots are better, trust me. All of my druid friends have recommended these to me, and I'm saving up to get them. Even though the GEBs give 9 Int&Wis, the 35 mana makes up for it on the coldains. GET THESE, they are awesome.
▲ Page top
RE: GEBs? Or Coldains
QuoteReply
# Dec 20 2002 at 5:35 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591779140129
View User Forum
206 posts
Yeah, these are without a doubt better than GEBS but GEBS are more expensive for some reason(who, among the people that would wear either of these, wouldn't drop one wis/int and 2 AC for 35 mana?).

I find it wierd that you can buy these for less than GEBS.

Edited, Fri Dec 20 05:11:00 2002
▲ Page top
RE: GEBs? Or Coldains
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2003 at 6:36 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592246402577
118 posts
I think many people like the GEB graphics and perhaps they are just better known (though I doubt that) so I would have to say its a fashion thing and yes there are people in everquest more concerned with looks than stats, call it roleplaying i guess.
▲ Page top
Mana pool. CSB's vs. GEB's
QuoteReply
# Aug 10 2002 at 3:21 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1593361638914
View User Forum
Sage
402 posts
To those of you wondering about these vs. gebs. Here's the breakdown for mana and int.

You get 12 points of mana for every point of int/wis up to 200. For every point of int/wis over 200 you get 6 points of mana. I don't know the mana formula's for those below level 50 but I think this will help.

So all in all, these boots give more mana for me (level 53 magi).
▲ Page top
RE: Mana pool. CSB's vs. GEB's
QuoteReply
# Dec 23 2002 at 9:31 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591779764302
Scholar
18 posts
Actually, I don't know what the INT formula for mana is, but WIS casters use the following formula regardless of level :

(( WIS / 5 ) + 2 ) * LVL

So ... in short, 1pt of wis = .2 mana, so at level 50, 1 wis = 10 mana, at level 60 1 wis = 12 mana, etc, etc.


Edited, Mon Dec 23 09:06:56 2002
▲ Page top
CSB v GEB
QuoteReply
# Jul 26 2002 at 12:45 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781218769
2 posts
GEB's would give 9 int/9wis to ur drood or pure caster or whoever u have wearin em...but the 35mana prolly makes CSB better, thats coming from a GEB drood hehe, altho geb's match my druid well for looks anyway but these boots aren't bad @ all
▲ Page top
Yay CSB!
QuoteReply
# Jul 23 2002 at 11:01 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255273103
Scholar
22 posts
I saw these auctioned in EC the other day, so I sent a tell to the seller asking how much she was selling them for. She said she'd go as low as 2.5k.. I gave her 1.7k and a velium sapphire necklace for these bad boys. :) The extra mana is always nice to have, and they look a lot better than GEBs would have looked on me. So I am a happy druid. :)

Lanalia Tournesol
Tunarian druid of the 39th season
Bertoxx
▲ Page top
Two Schools of Thought
QuoteReply
# Mar 25 2002 at 11:16 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592250645882
19 posts
When it comes to caster boots, there are the people who think GEBs are superior and people who think Coldain Skin Boots are superior.

As far as look goes, I'm all for Coldain Skin Boots which show as a darker version of the leather boots. It's just my opinion that it looks better as a druid than being all leather, with maybe some runed mithril bracers, and then suddenly giant gold metal boots. Depending on how the seller feels about the boots him or herself, they'll sell anywhere from 3k-5k. I bought them for 2.5k because I was lucky, and the seller was very nice. Those who wear GEBs tell you GEBs are better because of the +1 to whichever stat or those couple extra points of ac, but those who know, sell Coldain Skin Boots for more than GEBs, which are available from a few different sellers everyday whereas you're lucky to see Coldain Skin Boots auctioned, at all.

Of course, I might be completely bias because I chose to wear CSBs instead of GEBs. :)
▲ Page top
minimum faction
QuoteReply
# Feb 16 2002 at 12:36 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591766944370
8 posts
I did quest with amiable and it didnt work, got up to kindly and it did. So kindly is minimum faction. Hope that helps.

Enan

# Feb 20 2001 at 10:58 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592246099656

48 posts
These could be famred for major profit. Since the boots are tradeable, they can be done again and again. Those that chose giant factions over dwarf will make a hefty amount or be a master trader. If this happens, the cost of Eboots will plummet.
▲ Page top
better than GEBs
QuoteReply
# Jan 20 2001 at 1:59 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592246234501
9 posts
WOW these are better than Golden Efreeti Boots. GEBs are 9 int, 9 wis, 5 ac.
These are -1 int, -1 wis, but +35 mana. which in total is gonna be more mana than the 9 int or wis from GEBs. Also these can be worn by Iksar, so they are even better.

Xarinth
▲ Page top
RE: better than GEBs
QuoteReply
# Aug 14 2002 at 5:16 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255076925
View User Forum
172 posts
i would have to say they are both about equals.

if you're a tradeskiller and want max int/wis for that, and/or would benefit from enhancement haste 2, gebs edge these out.

if you're not going to be casting any buffs that are lower than level 45 spells, and aren't interested in tradeskilling, and are a good caster (dont need the extra AC at all), or already just happen to have 247 wis/int without footwear, these are better because you will get more mana from them.

if you're a combination of these two, you can argue with yourself over which is better =)
▲ Page top
RE: better than GEBs
QuoteReply
# Nov 08 2001 at 9:33 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757687988
View User Forum
111 posts
for twinks, these are much better than eboots.

but for a non twink (45+), they arent that much better. to me, 2 ac and another point of int is more valuable than ~25 mana (which is basically the trade off)

the coldain gloves are much, much better than the coldain boots however.
